Caption:
We LOVE seeing Dana Point all lit up this time of year✨🎄

In case you missed the boat parade of lights last weekend, you still have time to check out all the lights around our beautiful city, it’s truly something special. 

📸: @waterproject 

#visitdanapoint #mydanapoint #danapoint

The Harbor's 50th Annual Boat Parade of Lights is almost here!✨🎄☃ Our favorite way to kick off this holiday season!

When: December 12th-14th, starting at 6:30pm, with the theme Golden Jubilee - Carol of the Boats. 

The public is welcome to view the parade from the boardwalk and park areas, reserve a table with a view from one of the harbor’s waterfront restaurants, or hop aboard a special boat parade charter. We can't wait to see you there!🎅🏻❄️

Parking is available at the harbor on a first come, first serve basis. For more information, please visit https://danapointharbor.com/plan-your-visit/parking/ . 

#danapoint #mydanapoint #danapointharbor #visitdanapoint

Welcome to the neighborhood, Kaantique!🎉✂️ — a women’s fashion boutique striving for fair trade and sustainable goods. Both trendy and versatile, come shop all things clothing, jewelry, handbags, and accessories. Oh… and they have dog treats too! 

We’re happy to have you here in Dana Point! Located in La Plaza Park. #shoplocal #visitdanapoint #mydanapoint #danapoint

Happy Thanksgiving from Visit Dana Point! 🦃🌊🍂
We’re grateful for the people, places, and moments that make this coastal community so special. From the beauty of the ocean to the kindness of those who call Dana Point home — thank you for being part of what makes this place unforgettable.

Wishing you a peaceful holiday filled with gratitude, connection, and a little California sunshine🌞

#visitdanapoint #mydanapoint #danapoint

Our friends at @wamonarchbeach have lots of exciting Easter happenings this year!🐰🥂 Come celebrate Easter in style with multiple family-friendly experiences they are offering:

🐣Grand Lawn Easter Egg Hunt: Start your celebration by making everlasting moments together as you hunt for eggs as a family, and delight in spring-inspired festivities available all morning long including bounce houses, face painting, a balloon artist, and photo-ops with the Easter Bunny! Hunting begins at 9:30am-12pm.

AVEO Table+Bar: Celebrate Easter with a festive brunch buffet at AVEO Table+Bar. Dine on the outdoor terrace and explore an expansive spread of culinary offerings.. Reservations available from 9:30am-2:30pm.

Bourbon Steak: Enjoy and exclusive prix fixe menu showcasing a selection of savory starters, signature entrees, brunch-inspired dishes, handcrafted desserts, and a glass of Champagne for a festive flair. Reservations available for brunch from 11:00am-4:00pm.

Monarch Bay Beach Club: Dine just steps from the surf and sand and enjoy a seaside Easter Brunch or dinner experience and enjoy Chef Seth’s coastal-inspired Easter specials of savory creations from both land and sea. Reservations available for brunch from 10:30am-2:30pm, dinner from 2:30pm-9:00pm.

Club 19: Enjoy a casual breakfast experience on Easter Sunday with a savory a la carte menu, complimented by a range of festive mimosas and other libations. Dine on our outdoor patio with ocean and golf course views or gather together in the comfort of our indoor dining room in front of our cozy fireplace. Reservations available from 8:00am-12:00pm.

#visitdanapoint #mydanapoint #danapoint

The very first baby grey whale of the season was spotted by our friends at @danawharf on Sunday!🐋 

"Captain Brandon on board the Dana Pride spotted two blows in front of San Juan Rock. At last, our first Gray Whale cow/calf pair was heading north in front of the Dana Point Headlands. Seeing the blow from the mom (cow) and then the tiny “puff” from the calf delighted all onboard! This pair stayed very close to shore, and we relocated them off Aliso Canyon and now they seemed to have a Coastal Bottlenose Dolphin Escort leading the way. We wished this pair well as we left them off Victoria Beach."

#danawharfwhalewatching #danapoint #mydanapoint #visitdanapoint

🌊🏄 Ride the waves of history and meet the Masters of Surf! 🌊🏄

Waterman's Plaza, located next to the pedestrian bridge on Pacific Coast Highway near Dana Point Harbor Drive, pays tribute to filmmakers, industry moguls, and pioneers of the surf industry.

Statues of timeless legends like Hobie Alter, Phil Edwards, Bruce Brown, Joyce Hoffman, John Severson, and tandem surfers Barrie and Steve Boehne are among the public art on display.

📷@jpvsphoto // @cityofdanapoint
